title: Remove random fullscreen image and hide globe text in global mode

requirements.text: Remove the random/unintended image that appears in full screen mode (inside FullscreenOverlay or related fullscreen components). It should not be rendered at all.

quotes: It's not supposed to be there remove it

acceptanceCriteria: No unexpected or unintended image is visible when the app enters fullscreen mode
The fullscreen overlay renders only intentional elements (globe, visualizer, station info, slogans)

requirements.text: In global/globe mode, hide the text content rendered inside the GlobeView component to prevent it from conflicting with the top bar (AppHeader).

quotes: the text in globe mode should be hidden
The top bar in global mode has a conflict with the text in the globe component

acceptanceCriteria: When the Globe view is active, no text from GlobeView (e.g., labels, overlays, tooltips at rest) overlaps or conflicts with the AppHeader top bar
The GlobeView text/overlay elements are hidden or suppressed while in global mode
The 3D globe itself and interactive markers remain visible and functional

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not alter the globe's 3D rendering or interactive marker functionality
nonGoals: Adding new globe features or text elements
